# Blue Business

Blue Business is a Netherlands-based app development studio founded in 2021. The company designs and builds native iOS and Android apps, web applications, and digital platforms for SMEs, tourism operators, and public organizations in the Netherlands and across the Caribbean (Bonaire, Curaçao, Aruba).

## What Blue Business does

- Native iOS development (Swift) and native Android development (Kotlin)
- Web applications and Progressive Web Apps (Astro, Next.js, Remix)
- Product design, discovery sprints, and strategy work
- Ongoing maintenance, OS upgrade support, and quarterly roadmap work

## Who Blue Business serves

- SMEs in the Netherlands looking for custom mobile apps
- Tourism and hospitality businesses in the Caribbean
- Public-sector organizations in the Caribbean (island administrations, tourism boards, community platforms)
- SaaS startups building their first or second native app

## Key projects

- **Visit Bonaire** — All-in-one travel app for visitors of Bonaire. Native iOS and Android with offline navigation via Mapbox and realtime content via Firebase. Published by Blue Innovation BV. 5.0 stars on the Dutch App Store, live since 29 April 2025. https://apps.apple.com/nl/app/visit-bonaire/id6736879805
- **Bonaire Cruisers** — Self-guided audio-tour app for visitors exploring Bonaire by rental golf cart. Native iOS and Android, fully offline after install, bilingual NL/EN. Published by Blue Innovation BV. Live since June 2025. https://apps.apple.com/nl/app/bonaire-cruisers/id6745404102
- **Medewerker** — Native iOS and Android internal-communication platform combining news, onboarding, learning paths and gamification. Built by Blue Business for IDC Tech BV. Live customers include Hof van Saksen, Roompot and Run2Forty2. Live since June 2022. https://apps.apple.com/nl/app/medewerker/id1625432010
- **GAST** — White-label guest-experience app for holiday parks and hospitality, built on the same platform as Medewerker. Built by Blue Business for IDC Tech BV. Live customers include Hof van Saksen and Roompot. Live since August 2025. https://apps.apple.com/nl/app/gast/id1468467772
- **Run2Forty2** — Native sports app for marathon trainees: training schedules, news updates, kudos for fellow runners and direct chat with the coach. Same multi-tenant platform as Medewerker and GAST, with its own brand. Built by Blue Business for IDC Tech BV. Live since December 2025. https://apps.apple.com/nl/app/run2forty2/id6448728310

## Engagement

- Engagements begin with a 1-2 week discovery sprint to lock down scope
- Build phase runs in weekly TestFlight cycles so progress is visible every Monday
- Typical timeline from kickoff to App Store submission: 12-16 weeks
- Smaller scopes (prototypes, single-platform MVPs, take-overs of existing apps) and larger platform builds are equally welcome — Blue Business does not turn away small projects
